description: CRISPR base editor enzymes and deaminases

enzymes.name: Cas9
enzymes.notes: Catalytically inactive dCas9 used in base editors for targeting without cleavage

enzymes.name: APOBEC1
enzymes.notes: Rat APOBEC1 commonly used in CBEs; converts C to U in single-stranded DNA

enzymes.name: rAPOBEC1
enzymes.notes: Engineered APOBEC1 with reduced off-target activity

enzymes.name: TadA
enzymes.notes: Evolved TadA variants (TadA-8e) used in ABEs

enzymes.name: UGI
enzymes.notes: Prevents base excision repair from reverting C→U edits; improves C→T product purity
